payload.label: fireplace
payload.short_description: white painted mantel with black firebox
payload.long_description: White painted wooden mantel with rectangular decorative paneling and a black metal firebox insert; the firebox interior is a dark rectangular void with a gray folded fabric or cover partially visible on the hearth floor, and the mantel surround appears fully visible in the crop — approximate distance from camera ~2.0 meters.
